# skill-finder

> Use ONLY when the user explicitly asks to discover or evaluate a skill from OUTSIDE the curated catalog — e.g., "find a Stripe skill", "is there a skill for X?", "evaluate this candidate before adopting". Meta-skill, complementary to skill-selector: do NOT auto-invoke on routine apm-management, project-init, or catalog-resident requests. Cross-source survey across vetted registries (Anthropic official, claude-skill-registry, VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills, ComposioHQ, Superpowers, GitHub topic) with a mandatory waxa-eval adoption gate.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/meta/skill-finder
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/meta/skill-finder
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add mizchi/skills --skill skill-finder
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/meta/skill-finder ~/.claude/skills/skill-finder
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
